topic: Managing Fee Installments and Head Sequence during Collection
summary: Explains how to handle fee installments, manually adjust amounts, and the importance of the fee head sequence during fee collection.
navigation: Fee Collection Section (after selecting a student)
steps: View the fee demand, which includes installments.
By default, the first installment due will be selected based on the date.
Select specific installments or 'Select All' to include all installments.
To manually enter a partial amount, directly input the amount in the designated field. The system will allocate this amount based on the predefined fee head sequence.
Alternatively, manually adjust amounts for individual fee heads if needed.
business_rules: Installments are automatically selected based on due dates.
The system prioritizes fee heads based on a predefined sequence when a partial payment is made.
important_notes: The fee head sequence is configurable.
Default fee head sequence: Security > Tuition Fee > Transport > Hostel > Student Funds > Development Funds > Fines/Recharges.
questions: How do I apply a partial payment to a student's fee?
What is the default sequence for fee heads when collecting fees?
Can I change the fee head sequence?
How do I select multiple installments for payment?
